===={{aniseries|JN}}====
[[File:Serena JN.png|thumb|250px|left|Serena in {{aniseries|JN}}]]
In the time since she started traveling alone, Serena became a rising star in [[Hoenn]] and garnered a lot of local attention in [[Lilycove City]]. She also became friends and rivals with Hoenn's top contest idol, [[Lisia]], and helped her to liven up the local Contests.
[[File:Serena and Lisia.png|thumb|250px|Serena and Lisia]]
Serena reappeared in ''[[JN105|Reuniting for the First Time!]]'', where she met [[Chloe]] and her {{TP|Chloe|Eevee}}. After giving her some suggestions for her future and encouraging her to take part in a Pokémon Contest Spectacular, Serena participated in the event as well. While Chloe participated in the {{OBP|Rank|Contest|Normal Rank}} Contest Spectacular, Serena took part in the Master Rank competition, tying for first place with Lisia. As Chloe was departing at the docks, Serena revealed that Lisia approached her after the Contest to ask if she wanted to team up with her and form an idol duo together, which Serena is unsure about as of yet. Shortly afterwards, Ash and Goh arrived, and Serena briefly reunited with Ash, with the two promising to keep cheering for each other as they parted ways again. Serena waved goodbye and waited at the docks watching Ash depart, before leaving with renewed confidence to continue her journey.

In ''[[JN132|Partners in Time!]]'', Serena appeared alongside {{an|May}}, [[Max]], and Lisia, watching Ash's [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against {{an|Leon}}. Soon after, when Pikachu was at the limit of his strength, Serena, May, and Max were shown to be anxious about the state of the battle, each holding on to another for comfort.

Serena reappeared in a fantasy in ''[[JN135|Heroes Unite!]]'', alongside the Trainers Chloe and her Eevee had met.
